{"step_by_step_thinking": "Based on the information provided, niacin (vitamin B3) and folic acid (vitamin B9) are typically obtained from dietary sources and are not synthesized in the body. Pantothenic acid (vitamin B5) is synthesized in the body by humans through the catabolism of amino acids. Cyanocobalamin (vitamin B12) is not synthesized in the body and must be obtained through diet or supplementation.", "answer_choice": "B"}
